text: Make backend tests parallel-safe instead of relying on sequential package execution
description: The backend package test script now correctly runs the full suite, but it uses --test-concurrency=1 because some tests share fixed filesystem paths and interfere when files run concurrently. Isolate those fixtures so the suite can later run safely in parallel.

status.comment: Backend tests no longer rely on --test-concurrency=1. Fixed import-time server startup so tests can import server.ts without binding ports, moved shared-path suites to per-run temp directories, removed the concurrency guard from packages/backend/scripts/run-tests.mjs, and verified npm run test -w backend passes with the full current backend suite (26 tests).
